chet holmgren.detail: Played 27 minutes with no confirmed injury exit; missed rebound prop with 4 rebounds in 27 minutes
chet holmgren.web_narrative: Holmgren played 27 minutes and finished with 4 rebounds, falling short of the over 6 line. No confirmed injury exit; limited minutes may reflect normal playoff rotation management or matchup decisions.

dylan harper.detail: Exited Game 2 in the third quarter with a right hamstring injury and did not return; ruled out for remainder of game
dylan harper.web_narrative: Harper suffered a right hamstring injury in the third quarter and was ruled out for the remainder of the game, finishing with 2 rebounds in 25 minutes — well below the over 4 rebound line. The early exit directly caused him to miss his rebound prop.
